title: MEDEK Accreditation Site Visit Conducted at Doğuş University Vocational School
content:
Student

News

Details

Date: 10 November 2025

MEDEK Accreditation Site Visit Conducted at Doğuş University Vocational School

The Vocational Education Evaluation and Accreditation Association (MEDEK), one of the leading institutions pioneering the establishment of a quality culture in vocational education in Türkiye, successfully completed its accreditation site visit process for the Public Relations and Promotion and Construction Technology programs of Doğuş University Vocational School.

The evaluation team, led by Prof. Dr. Serkan ŞENGÜL, conducted inspections at the Vocational School over three days. During the visit, meetings were held with faculty members, students, alumni, administrative staff, and external stakeholders of the programs, and the programs’ educational quality, learning outcomes, and continuous improvement processes were comprehensively evaluated.

Throughout the visit, our Vice Rectors Prof. Dr. Yelda ÖZKOÇAK and Prof. Dr. Erkut ALTINDAĞ also participated in the process, meeting with the evaluators and program teams. At the end of the process, the exit report prepared by the MEDEK evaluation team was presented to our Vocational School Director, Assoc. Prof. Dr. Semra BOĞA.

As Doğuş University Vocational School, we are proud to be part of this accreditation process and would like to thank the MEDEK team for their dedicated efforts to enhance the quality of vocational education.
